questionText: Does your organization exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues?
questionKo: 귀사는 exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues입니까?
simpleHelp: Active ownership is a key tool for positively affecting the real economy because divestment alone leaves investors without a voice to promote sustainable practices. Alongside their investee engagement activities, investors can influence their investee companies on environmental issues by exercising their voting rights. Data users are interested in understanding how aligned shareholders' voting decisions across the investment portfolio are with the overall environmental strategy and how they support environmental shareholder resolutions.

columns.text: Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues
options: No, but we plan to in the next two years
No, and we do not plan to in the next two years
No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in any of our investments
columns.textKo: Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈
optionsKo: No, but we plan to in the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to in the next two years
No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in 하나 이상 of our investments

columns.text: Primary reason for not exercising voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not exercising voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈
optionsKo: 부족 internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not 관련

columns.text: Explain why you do not exercise voting rights on environmental issues
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 you do not exercise voting rights on 환경 이슈

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Activity undertaken" for the rows "Investing (Asset manager)" and/or "Investing (Asset owner)" of 1.10.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "예" in response to 열 1 "Activity undertaken" 에 대한 행 "Investing (Asset manager)" 및/또는 "Investing (Asset owner)" of 1.10.

guidance.text:
Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if you exercise your voting rights as a shareholder, including directly and indirectly (e.g., through an external service provider) on environmental issues.
You will have the opportunity to provide further details on how you have exercised your voting rights in the following question.
Select "No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in any of our investments" if voting rights are not applicable for your investments, e.g.: non-voting shares.
Explain why you do not exercise voting rights on environmental issues (column 3) 
Provide an explanation specific to your organization explaining why you do not exercise voting rights on environmental issues, and outline any plans to do so in the future.
guidance.textKo: Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈 (열 1) Select "예" 만약 you exercise your voting rights as a shareholder, 포함 directly 및 indirectly (e.g., through an external service provider) on 환경 이슈. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on how you have exercised your voting rights in the following 문항. Select "No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in 하나 이상 of our investments" 만약 voting rights are not 해당되는 경우 귀사의 investments, e.g.: non-voting shares. 그 이유를 설명 you do not exercise voting rights on 환경 이슈 (열 3) Provide an 설명 specific to 귀사 explaining why you do not exercise voting rights on 환경 이슈, 및 outline 하나 이상 plans to do so in the future.

guidance.text: Investors exercise their right for shareholder voting on environmental issues.
guidance.textKo: Investors exercise their right for shareholder voting on 환경 이슈.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' NOT completed - 0/5 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' NOT 완성 - 0/5 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/5점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points awarded AND
'Yes' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Disclosure points awarded AND
'No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in any of our investments' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
Full Disclosure points awarded AND
'No, but we plan to in the next two years' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 1/3 points
A maximum of 1/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'No, and we do not plan to in the next two years' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' NOT completed - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 공시에서 최고점 획득 그리고 '예' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 공시에서 최고점 획득 그리고 'No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in 하나 이상 of our investments' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 공시에서 최고점 획득 그리고 'No, but we plan to in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 1/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/3점입니다. 또는 경로 D) 'No, 및 we do not plan to in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' NOT 완성 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Awareness points awarded AND
'Yes' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Awareness points awarded AND
'No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in any of our investments' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
Either 'No, but we plan to in the next two years' OR 'No, and we do not plan to in the next two years' selected in column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on environmental issues' NOT completed - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 인지에서 최고점 획득 그리고 '예' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 인지에서 최고점 획득 그리고 'No, as we do not have shareholder voting rights in 하나 이상 of our investments' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. 또는 경로 C) Either 'No, but we plan to in the next two years' 또는 'No, 및 we do not plan to in the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Exercise voting rights as a shareholder on 환경 이슈' NOT 완성 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

change.scoring_change_summary:
CC Financial services Disclosure • Scoring has been updated to be proportionally scored for all the displayed columns. Scoring has been updated so that there is consistency between Climate Change, Forests and Water.
F/W Financial services Awareness • ROUTE C, D and NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE has been added. Scoring has been updated so that there is consistency between Climate Change, Forests and Water.
F/W Financial services Management • Point allocations have been updated. ROUTE A now has a maximum of 1/1 point available. ROUTE C and the NON- DISCLSOURE ROUTE now has a maximum of 0/3 points available. Scoring has been updated so that there is consistency between Climate Change, Forests and Water.
change.daml_summary: Financial services: D 2/2 | A 0 or 1/0, 1 or 3 | M 0 or 1/0, 1 or 3 | L 0/0

simpleHelpKo: Active ownership is a key tool for positively affecting the real economy because divestment alone leaves investors without a voice to promote sustainable practices. Alongside their investee 참여 activities, investors can influence their investee companies on 환경 이슈 by exercising their voting rights. 데이터 사용자 are interested in understanding how aligned shareholders' voting decisions across the investment 포트폴리오 are with the overall 환경전략 및 how they support environmental shareholder resolutions.
